productDisplayName: Esprit Women Purple Silicon Silver Watches
description: Taking traditional designs and giving it modern twist is what makes esprit watches timeless timepieces. This classic Silicon Vanity analog wrist watch from esprit is no exception. Contemporary and trendy, it& rsquo s an affordable timepiece with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. Case diameter: 35 mm Case thickness: 9.5 mm Dial shape: Round Metallic case with zircon crystal embellishments and a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Silicon strap with a tang clasp Durable, scratch-resistant mineral crystal glass Silver textured dial with bronze-dusted hour markings and hands Quartz movement of time display with fluorescent hands to view time in low light conditions Screw to reset time Solid case back for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it when washing hands or your car
